commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Codex app-server bridge retry handling before visible output or side effects, propagates side-effect metadata from the Codex event projector, expands auto-reply regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main emits the exact app-server bridge failure messages and lacks a bridge-specific retry/no-retry handler, while the PR adds mocked regression coverage for those strings and output/side-effect boundaries. I did not live-induce the bridge drop in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No narrow automated code repair remains; a maintainer should wait for exact-head CI and require direct bridge-drop proof or explicitly accept the replay-risk proof gap before merge.

target.title: Retry app-server bridge drops safely
